mnemonics: Hyperledger is a open-source blockchain framework
Hyperledger Fabric is a variant of Hyperledger Fabric
keyPoints: Hyperledger Fabric consists of three main components: a runtime, a set of tools, and a framework
Hyperledger Fabric uses a consensus algorithm called the Fabric SDK
Hyperledger Sawtooth Lake is a blockchain platform built on the Sawtooth consensus algorithm
Corda is a distributed ledger platform developed by R3
